summary: Tested Shared Inboxes and Bulk Customer Transfer features. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All admin pages load correctly with proper UI components.

integration_issues.flow: Direct URL navigation to admin pages
integration_issues.issue: When navigating directly to /admin/shared-inboxes or /admin/bulk-transfer via URL, API calls fail with 'User not found' because user session may not be loaded yet. Works correctly when navigating through the app normally.
integration_issues.priority: LOW - only affects direct URL navigation, not normal app usage

issues: Console warning: 'handshake' is not a valid icon name for family 'ionicons' - minor icon fallback issue

critical_code_review_comments: Consider adding loading state check before API calls in admin pages - wait for user?.id before making API calls
ROLE_ICONS in directory.tsx uses 'handshake' which is not a valid ionicons name - should use 'hand-left' or similar
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_shared_inboxes_bulk_transfer.py - Created comprehensive tests for Shared Inboxes and Bulk Transfer APIs
seed_data_creation: Test shared inbox was created and deleted during backend testing. Bulk transfer was executed between users during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shared Inboxes and Bulk Transfer features are fully working. Backend APIs at /api/admin/team/shared-inboxes (CRUD + assign/unassign) and /api/admin/team/bulk-transfer (preview, execute, history) all pass tests. Frontend pages at /admin/shared-inboxes and /admin/bulk-transfer load correctly. Company Directory $/Hour tab now scrolls properly. All features use user_id query parameter for admin authorization.

backend_shared_inboxes_api.create_shared_inbox: PASS - POST creates new inbox with name, phone, description
backend_shared_inboxes_api.duplicate_phone_number_rejected: PASS - Returns 400 for duplicate phone number
backend_shared_inboxes_api.get_inbox_details: PASS - GET /{id} returns inbox with assigned users
backend_shared_inboxes_api.assign_user_to_inbox: PASS - POST /{id}/assign adds user to inbox
backend_shared_inboxes_api.verify_user_assigned: PASS - User appears in assigned_users list
backend_shared_inboxes_api.verify_user_unassigned: PASS - User no longer in assigned_users

backend_bulk_transfer_api.get_transfer_preview: PASS - Preview shows contacts, conversations, tasks, campaigns counts
backend_bulk_transfer_api.get_transfer_history: PASS - Returns list of past transfers
backend_bulk_transfer_api.execute_bulk_transfer: PASS - Transfers items between users with details
backend_bulk_transfer_api.invalid_from_user_rejected: PASS - Returns error for invalid source user

frontend_shared_inboxes_page.header_present: PASS - Shows 'Shared Inboxes' title with back and + buttons
frontend_shared_inboxes_page.info_banner: PASS - Shows explanation about shared inboxes
frontend_shared_inboxes_page.empty_state: PASS - Shows 'No shared inboxes yet' with create button
frontend_shared_inboxes_page.create_inbox_button: PASS - + and Create Shared Inbox buttons visible

frontend_bulk_transfer_page.header_present: PASS - Shows 'Bulk Transfer' title with back button
frontend_bulk_transfer_page.start_transfer_button: PASS - Orange 'Start New Transfer' button visible
frontend_bulk_transfer_page.transfer_history_section: PASS - Shows 'Transfer History' with empty state
frontend_bulk_transfer_page.modal_opens: PASS - Clicking Start New Transfer opens modal with Transfer FROM section

frontend_gamification_dashboard.all_tabs_visible: PASS - Directory, $/Hour, Revenue, Resellers tabs present
frontend_gamification_dashboard.efficiency_tab_works: PASS - $/Hour tab shows leaderboard with MVP badge
frontend_gamification_dashboard.per_hour_earnings_displayed: PASS - Shows $75, $50, $45, etc. Per Hour values
frontend_gamification_dashboard.ranking_badges: PASS - MVP badge for #1, numbered badges for others

noted: All Shared Inboxes and Bulk Transfer APIs are real implementations with MongoDB
